lifecycleScripts.afterStart: npx wp-env run cli -- wp post create --post_type=page --post_title='Find My Representative' --post_content='<!-- wp:find-my-rep/contact-block /-->' --post_status=publish --porcelain | xargs -I {} npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update page_on_front {} && npx wp-env run cli -- wp option update show_on_front page
